summary: Iter16 testing complete: P0 email verification flow (register no-token, verify, expired, invalid, resend rate-limiting), P1 robots.txt + sitemap, P2 sortable headers on Payments + Subscriptions tabs. All 12 backend tests pass and all frontend flows verified.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~2000+ lines (over 700 line threshold) — recommend splitting into modules (auth, admin, payments, referrals, sitemap).
verify_email currently auto-logs-in via cookie AND returns token in body. Frontend uses body token; cookie also set — harmless but duplicate.
resend-verification response leaks 'rate_limited:true' which enables enumeration of recently-registered emails (minor). Consider returning generic body.
Register response includes 'email_mocked' flag — useful for dev, but not shown to user. OK.
Chart width(-1) console warnings appear on admin dashboard (Recharts container size) — pre-existing, non-blocking.
seed_data_creation: Test users prefixed with test_iter16_ and test_legacy_ auto-cleaned in test_zzz_cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests use http://localhost:8001 directly (not REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL) so they share the same local Mongo for injecting known verification tokens. UI tests use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Note: emails are lowercased by /auth/register, so test emails must be lowercase to match DB lookups.

P0_backend: POST /auth/register creates user with email_verified=false, auth_provider='manual', no token in response, email_verification_sent=true, db.email_verifications row created
POST /auth/login with unverified manual user → 403 with 'verifikasi' message
Legacy user (no auth_provider field) still logs in successfully
POST /auth/verify-email with valid token → 200 + user + token, sets email_verified=true; re-use of same token → 400
POST /auth/resend-verification within 3-min window → rate_limited=true, no new token inserted
POST /auth/resend-verification when no recent token → creates new verification row
Google upsert path in code sets auth_provider='google' and email_verified=true (server.py lines 1869-1871)
P1_backend: GET /api/sitemap.xml returns valid XML with <urlset> and <url> entries
P0_frontend: /register-check-email shows data-testid='check-email-page' with email + 3-step guide + resend-btn
Login attempt with unverified user shows toast/error text containing 'verifikasi' (403 returned)
/verify-email?token=invalid shows data-testid='verify-email-page' with error state + data-testid='resend-verification-form'
P2_frontend: PaymentsTab: sort-user, sort-service_name, sort-amount, sort-due_date, sort-status all present and clickable; ASC↔DESC toggle works
SubscriptionsTab: sort-user, sort-service, sort-price, sort-start, sort-status all present and clickable; toggle works
